name: dev-teams
description: Multi-team AI organization with specialized agents for development and data workflows
longDescription:
A comprehensive multi-team plugin featuring two specialized teams:

**Dev Team**: Architect-led team with 7 specialized agents (Instructor, Noob, Documenter, Tester, Reviewer, Deployer, Maintainer) for full-cycle software development.

**Data Team**: Accountant-led swarm with minute-men workers for parallel data processing, training pipelines, and evaluation tasks.

Includes shared coordination infrastructure, cross-team protocols, and persistent memory systems.
author: Lyuwen Fu
